series_metadata.series_description: Submitted for each year; includes both individual and corporate submittals as well as returns. The form is submitted by all transporters of waste into Ohio, both actual transporters and businesses, giving irrevocable consent to the jurisdiction of Ohio courts.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area for 6 months and then 20 years in off- site storage at SRC and then destroy., Paper: Recycle
